item.title: Guardio Labs | Exposing Online Scams & Threat Tactics
item.description: Guardio Labs is the research arm of Guardio, uncovering the hidden infrastructure of scams, phishing, and malware across the digital landscape.

item.title: “Prompt Inception” - Did Grok just say Elon Musk is the President?
item.description: When AI Becomes the Single Source of Truth - Whose Truth Will It Be?

item.title: "Scamlexity": When Agentic AI Browsers Get Scammed
item.description: We Put Agentic AI Browsers to the Test - They Clicked, They Paid, They Failed

item.title: "VibeScamming" — From Prompt to Phish: Benchmarking Popular AI Agents’ Resistance to the Dark Side
item.description: &quot;VibeScamming&quot; — From Prompt to Phish: Benchmarking Popular AI Agents’ Resistance to the Dark Side

item.title: “DeceptionAds” — Fake Captcha Driving Infostealer Infections and a Glimpse to the Dark Side of Internet Advertising
item.description: “DeceptionAds” — Fake Captcha Driving Infostealer Infections and a Glimpse to the Dark Side of Internet Advertising

item.title: “CrossBarking” — Exploiting a 0-Day Opera Vulnerability with a Cross-Browser Extension Store Attack
item.description: “CrossBarking” — Exploiting a 0-Day Opera Vulnerability with a Cross-Browser Extension Store Attack

item.title: “EchoSpoofing” — A Massive Phishing Campaign Exploiting Proofpoint’s Email Protection to Dispatch Millions of Perfectly Spoofed Emails
item.description: “EchoSpoofing” — A Massive Phishing Campaign Exploiting Proofpoint’s Email Protection to Dispatch Millions of Perfectly Spoofed Emails

item.title: “CVE-2024-21388” – Microsoft Edge’s Marketing API Exploited for Covert Extension Installation
item.description: “CVE-2024-21388” – Microsoft Edge’s Marketing API Exploited for Covert Extension Installation

item.title: “SubdoMailing” — Thousands of Hijacked Major-Brand Subdomains Found Bombarding Users With Millions of Malicious Emails
item.description: “SubdoMailing” — Thousands of Hijacked Major-Brand Subdomains Found Bombarding Users With Millions of Malicious Emails
